items.text: Where do we go from here 我们从这里往哪里走 Now it's up to you to start creating animations of your own 现在轮到你开始制作你自己的动画了 And now we can add animation tracks 现在我们可以添加动画轨道 by clicking on this plus animation here 通过点击这里的加号动画 and we'll see all of the animations 然后我们会看到所有的动画 that are loaded in with Echo 这是与Echo一起加载的所有动画 So we have different jumps 所以我们有不同的跳跃 that we can string together inside of our sequence 我们可以在序列内串联在一起的动作 And then we'll just update transform tracks 然后我们只需更新变换轨道 of our character and our cine camera 我们的角色和电影相机的变换轨道 So give it a shot 所以试试看吧 even if it's something simple 即使是一些简单的东西 Start by blocking in a shot here 从这里开始布置一个镜头 and then go ahead and start animating the camera and Echo 然后继续开始给相机和Echo添加动画 and string together several different animations 并将几个不同的动画串联在一起 click on our Movie Render Queue 点击我们的电影渲染队列 clapperboard here 在这里点击踢脚板 and for a movie config 选择电影配置 select PlayBlast or PlayBlast QuickTime 选择PlayBlast或PlayBlast QuickTime
items.speaker: instructor
